channel.title: elizaOS Daily Intelligence
channel.description: Daily facts and insights from the elizaOS ecosystem

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-16
item.description:
Summary: Development activity on May 16 concentrated on foundational hardening, including cross-platform vault integration and critical bug fixes for ElizaOS. Community discussions highlighted new partnership curiosity and the introduction of an AI agent escrow protocol on Base Mainnet.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • feat(slack): migrate plugin-slack into the monorepo (merged)
  • telegram: milady wrapper + @elizaos/plugin-telegram both poll the same bot — race causes silent message loss (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Light activity focused on greetings and a brief confirmation of active work on 'eliza OZ'. Curiosity was expressed regarding a significant partnership announcement....
  • #coders: Introduction of a simple escrow primitive for AI agents on Base, designed to maintain auditable incentive structures while avoiding trust logic in the runtime....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-15
item.description:
Summary: The ecosystem is focused on AI agent model optimization through a new Eliza-1 (Qwen3.5) series and the introduction of a decentralized 'Pay or Burn' escrow protocol on Base. Infrastructure efforts are centered on the Eliza v3 transition and resolving plugin registry accessibility issues.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • feat(slack): migrate plugin-slack into the monorepo (merged)
  • plugin-sql runtime-migrator missing drizzle pgTable defs (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on Eliza-1 model specifications and the v3 development roadmap. Concerns raised regarding AgentID integration....
  • #coders: Technical deep dive into the 'Pay or Burn' escrow protocol, Farcaster API credit optimization, and plugin registry connectivity issues....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-14
item.description:
Summary: Development has shifted focus toward Elizabeth v3 infrastructure stabilization and the launch of the Qwen3.5-based Eliza-1 model series. Key technical challenges emerged regarding the v2 plugin registry infrastructure, resulting in persistent 404 errors and a potential revert to monorepo PRs.

GitHub Activity:

  • @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • plugin-sql runtime-migrator missing drizzle pgTable defs for entity_identities (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on the Eliza-1 model series specifications and inquiries regarding the v3 development roadmap and identity systems....
  • #coders: Negotiations for GODL protocol integration, focusing on on-chain mining mechanics and autonomous staking strategies....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-13
item.description:
Summary: Technical efforts are currently focused on resolving a major outage of the v2 plugin registry while addressing security concerns regarding compromised Discord accounts. Strategic infrastructure hardening continues with the migration of the Slack plugin into the monorepo and the implementation of @elizaos/vault for cross-platform secrets management.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • feat(slack): migrate plugin-slack into the monorepo (merged)
  • feat(cloud): support monetized container app domains (merged)
  • plugin-sql runtime-migrator missing drizzle pgTable defs for entity_identities (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #coders: Technical debate regarding the failure of the v2 registry infrastructure. Developers are unable to submit new plugins due to 404 errors on the registry repository....
  • #discussion: Introductory greetings and requests for sandbox testing of Python-based orchestrators. General community sentiment is focused on onboarding new talent....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-12
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is focused on hardening core infrastructure and stabilizing monorepo architecture while managing community concerns regarding token support and leadership transparency. Recent development activity centers on cross-platform secrets management, multi-agent orchestration testing, and cloud-native monetization features.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • feat(slack): migrate plugin-slack into the monorepo (merged)
  • telegram: milady wrapper + @elizaos/plugin-telegram both poll the same bot — race causes silent message loss (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #coders: Focus on multi-agent orchestrator testing permissions and significant reduction in bot operational costs....
  • #discussion: Networking and self-introductions by AI engineers alongside unanswered concerns regarding leadership changes on X (Twitter)....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-11
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is undergoing significant core hardening, highlighted by the migration of major plugins like Slack into the monorepo and the implementation of @elizaos/vault for secure, cross-platform secret management. Development focus has shifted toward cloud-native stability and automated workflow refinements despite emerging technical debt in authentication and database schema consistency.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • feat(slack): migrate plugin-slack into the monorepo (merged)
  • telegram: milady wrapper + @elizaos/plugin-telegram both poll the same bot — race causes silent message loss (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Primarily social activity, greetings, and newcomer introductions. User rsn6958 introduced themselves as an AI full-stack dev focused on clean, production-ready code....
  • #coders: Focused on the financial costs of running Twitter bots and security vigilance against scams. Odilitime reported a 90% drop in monthly operation costs (from $100 down to $10)....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-10
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is focused on hardening core infrastructure and stabilizing multi-agent orchestration, while managing technical debt in plugin compatibility and addressing potential token market manipulation.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • feat(slack): migrate plugin-slack into the monorepo (merged)
  • telegram: milady wrapper + @elizaos/plugin-telegram both poll the same bot — race causes silent message loss (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #coders: Discussions centered on the necessity of the X API for integrations, technical difficulties with the Hyperfy plugin removal, and manual distribution of plugin files as a workaround....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-09
item.description:
Summary: This week focused on foundational hardening of the core infrastructure, including repository consolidation and the launch of a cross-platform secrets vault. Development shifted toward improving security documentation for DeFi plugins and resolving critical authentication issues in cloud and social integrations.

GitHub Activity:

  • @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • migrate plugin-slack into the monorepo (merged)
  • telegram: milady wrapper + @elizaos/plugin-telegram both poll the same bot — race causes silent message loss (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #-discussion: Technical discussions focused on a full-stack project showcase using Next.js 15 and RAG architecture. Market analysis of the ElizaOS coin suggested potential price manipulation due to a divergence in ...
  • #coders: Community members sought API endpoint receivers for IP-to-IP communication and discussed experience building autonomous blockchain agents using FastAPI....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-08
item.description:
Summary: The community focus shifted to resolving version mismatches between elizaOS core and the Hyperfy plugin, alongside mandatory Twitter API authentication changes. Major infrastructure hardening continued with the consolidation of ElizaCloud into the main repository and the introduction of a cross-platform secrets vault.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • feat(slack): migrate plugin-slack into the monorepo (merged)
  • feat(cloud): support monetized container app domains (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #coders: Technical focus on the missing Hyperfy plugin and its removal due to versioning issues. Assistance was provided via manual file transfers and suggestions to use coding agents for repair....
  • #discussion: Discussion regarding Twitter API authentication costs and notification of UI bugs in the documentation summary pages....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-07
item.description:
Summary: elizaOS has expanded its payment infrastructure by adding default payment methods for x402 routes and completed a major repository consolidation, merging ElizaCloud into the main eliza monorepo.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • feat(slack): migrate plugin-slack into the monorepo (merged)
  • feat(cloud): support monetized container app domains (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Key announcements regarding payment infrastructure milestones and project governance clarifications. Shaw addressed concerns about the lack of VC backing and the shift toward a builder-centric model....
  • #coders: Technical inquiries focused on deployment feasibility (Mac mini, cloud costs) and specific connectivity statuses like Hyperfy....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-06
item.description:
Summary: Development focus shifted to the eliza-1 model training phase involving advanced optimization techniques like speculative decoding and quantization. Concurrently, the community is navigating cross-chain token bridging between BSC and Solana while facing increased scam activity targeting migrations.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • chore: add cloud and plugins, remove rust and python (merged)
  • feat(slack): migrate plugin-slack into the monorepo (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Shaw detailed the technical roadmap for eliza-1, emphasizing general-purpose capabilities and high-performance inference. Discussions also covered token bridging solutions like Wormhole and deBridge....
  • #coders: Focused on security and moderation, with users flagging scammers and requesting bans for malicious links related to token migration....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-05
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is undergoing a massive architectural transformation with the consolidation of the cloud and plugin monorepos, alongside a significant market valuation surge of up to 130%. Development focus has shifted toward infrastructure hardening, secure secrets management via @elizaos/vault, and preparation for the ElizaOS V3 launch.

GitHub Activity:

  • chore: add cloud and plugins, remove rust and python (merged)
  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • feat(cloud): support monetized container app domains (merged)
  • telegram: milady wrapper + @elizaos/plugin-telegram both poll the same bot — race causes silent message loss (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: High engagement regarding the V3 price surge (90-130%). Discussions focused on transitioning elizaOS from a 'memecoin' to essential AI infrastructure. Technical praise from major LLM providers was a k...
  • #general: Shaw articulated that token holders are not traditional investors and the project prioritizes revenue-generating products over short-term buybacks....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-04
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS project is focused on foundational hardening and infrastructure modernization, including a transition to Clean Architecture and the launch of a new cross-platform secrets vault. Meanwhile, project leadership is managing significant community tension regarding token economics by emphasizing long-term product revenue over speculative price action.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • chore: add cloud and plugins, remove rust and python (merged)
  • refactor(cloud): Clean Architecture migration (WIP) (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: High-tension debate regarding ELIZAOS token price; Shaw emphasized that token holders are not traditional investors and revenue-generating products (Milady, Cloud) must precede buybacks....
  • #coders: Technical discussions regarding server spam filters blocking URLs; established a workaround using backticks. Research shared on memory rot in AI agents....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-03
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is undergoing a massive infrastructure stabilization effort with the consolidation of the v3 architecture and essential security improvements like the new cross-platform vault. Technical focus has shifted toward resolving critical Telegram integration issues and neutralizing memory degradation in long-lived agents.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • chore: add cloud and plugins, remove rust and python (open)
  • telegram: milady wrapper + @elizaos/plugin-telegram both poll the same bot — race causes silent message loss (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on the upcoming v3 architecture, including task issuance to Codex/Claude and the financial history of the project development funding....
  • #partners: Establishment of the 'Eliza Army Steering' group to coordinate community and partner efforts to maintain project momentum....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-02
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS project is undergoing a significant infrastructure modernization, including the launch of a new secrets vault and successful integration with robotics hardware. Development has transitioned toward a modular application runtime in version 3, despite financial challenges stemming from token value fluctuations.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration (merged)
  • feat(self-hosted): CORS + bearer auth + cross-platform build fixes (merged)
  • plugin-sql runtime-migrator missing drizzle pgTable defs (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Comparison between ElizaOS (developer framework) and Orbofi (consumer platform). Discussion on hardware integration with Unitree robots and NDA restrictions regarding exchange listings....
  • #coders: Deep dive into 'memory rot' failure modes. Introduction of a reconciliation pass architecture to maintain agent accuracy over time....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-05-01
item.description:
Summary: Lead developer Shaw clarified the architecture and personal funding of ElizaOS v3 while addressing community frustration over token value collapse and development pace. Significant technical progress was reported including the implementation of $ELIZA as a default payment method for infrastructure and major upgrades to the core AI SDK dependencies.

GitHub Activity:

  • Codex signal CLI auto-install (merged)
  • Event-kind triggers to the runtime (merged)
  • Multi-chain A2A payment functionality (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Intense debate regarding project pace and tokenomics. Shaw provided a strategic deep-dive into v3 architecture (runtime applications and Eliza Cloud) and disclosed personal financial struggles related...
  • #coders: Technical discussions focused on local LLM data storage, agent key security, and the development of red team swarm testing methodologies....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-30
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is undergoing a significant architectural shift by decoupling the core agent server from application packages while simultaneously expanding native mobile capabilities for Android. Core developer Shaw addressed community concerns regarding market performance by confirming active work on Eliza Cloud and a token utility model via the x402 payment standard.

GitHub Activity:

  • V2.0.0 release (open)
  • Enabled native agent execution on Android devices (merged)
  • Decoupled agent server from specific apps (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Shaw provided major updates on elizaOS development, confirming work on Eliza Cloud and autonomous agents with crypto features. He addressed token performance, noting that buybacks are contingent on pr...
  • #general: The community discussed the $ELIZA token integration into x402 infrastructure and the completion of Eliza v3 and Milady integrations....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-29
item.description:
Summary: The project is approaching a major release with Eliza v3 and Milady integration nearing completion, while concurrently managing a critical technical blocker in the dependency modernization stack. A significant utility milestone was achieved by implementing $ELIZA as the default payment method for x402 infrastructure services.

GitHub Activity:

  • PR #7146 (Dependency Blocker) (open)
  • V2.0.0 release (open)
  • Plugin Proposal: AgentID (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on Eliza v3 readiness and token utility. Discussions shifted from price speculation to infrastructure-linked payments ($ELIZA in x402)....
  • #coders: Minimal activity; primarily focused on moderation and removing scammers....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-28
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is nearing the release of Version 3 and Eliza Cloud while undergoing a major ecosystem-wide dependency modernization targeting Node.js 24 and TypeScript 6. Community sentiment is currently split between technical progress and significant concern regarding token price performance.

GitHub Activity:

  • V2.0.0 release (open)
  • feat: pipeline hooks (merged)
  • fix(core): prevent duplicate LLM calls when message contains URL (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Discussions were dominated by token price performance and requests for VC partnerships, alongside educational sessions on the 1966 ELIZA chatbot and the ELIZA effect....
  • #general: Technical deep dive into Hierarchical Task Networks (HTN) and their implementation path from HTN-lite to full LLM-based planning in ElizaOS v2....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-27
item.description:
Summary: Development activity peaked with major roadmap milestones for ElizaOS v3 and Eliza Cloud reaching final stages, while technical discussions addressed the implementation of Hierarchical Task Networks (HTN). A strategic shift in token utility was clarified, favoring revenue-based buybacks over restrictive payment methods to reduce user friction.

GitHub Activity:

  • V2.0.0 release (open)
  • feat(triggers): wire event-kind triggers to the runtime event bus (merged)
  • Plugin Proposal: AgentID — Cryptographic Identity & Trust Layer (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: High-level strategic discussion on token economics and v3/Cloud readiness. Community participation focused on roadmap timing and market performance....
  • #coders: Technical deep dive into Hierarchical Task Networks (HTN) vs Hierarchical Temporal Memory (HTM) and the upgrade path for agent planning in Eliza v2....
